case_title: OTGONTUVA JANCHIV VS. BAY PROPERTY GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY PROPERTY GROUP, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JANCHIV, OTGONTUVA AS TO DEFENDANT BAY PROPERTY GROUP, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,826.00 FILED BY JANCHIV, OTGONTUVA AS TO DEFENDANT BAY PROPERTY GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JANCHIV, OTGONTUVA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF APR-21-2015 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-20-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAY PROPERTY GROUP, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2015 - CONTINUED FOR POSSIBLE CLERKICAL ERROR TO MAR-18-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. THE MATTER WAS HEARD AND THEN TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. IF NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT, THEN THE JUDGMENT RENDERED ON MARCH 10, 2015 WILL STAND. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2015 - CONTINUED TO APR-21-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BECAUSE THE DEFENDANT WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO PRO TEM ROBERT SHEPPARD TO HEAR THE MATTER. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH SHAMTORRICA STROUD (TITLE: COLLECTIONS). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM ROBERT SHEPPARD, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D506
